description: Extend the Docker Compose project at /home/ga/s3-project to include a local MinIO service and configure the Flask application to use it. The MinIO service must use the minio/minio image with the command 'server /data --console-address ":9001"'. Configure the web service with environment variables S3_ENDPOINT_URL, AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, and AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY to point to the local MinIO service. Ensure a bucket named company-assets is automatically created when the stack starts so that it exists without manual intervention. The Flask application, which uses boto3 and is accessible at http://localhost:5000, must be able to upload files to this bucket. Use minioadmin for the access and secret keys.
